description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a wooden frame and base with a natural light wood finish. The seat and backrest are composed of two large, plush, dark gray cushions that appear to be upholstered in a subtly textured, semi-glossy material, likely faux leather or vinyl. The left side of the sofa incorporates an integrated wooden platform that extends beyond the seat, serving as a built-in side table or shelf. The backrest is straight and continuous, matching the width of the seat, and the sofa lacks traditional armrests, giving it a sleek, open appearance. The legs are short, block-style, and made from the same wood as the frame, providing sturdy support. This piece would fit well in urban parks, modern public spaces, or contemporary outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, two-seater sofa with dark gray textured cushions and a light wood frame, featuring an integrated side platform and no armrests.
description_view_0: Front view shows two large, dark gray cushions on a light wood base, with an extended wooden platform on the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thickness of the seat and back cushions, and the flush alignment of the wooden platform with the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous wooden back panel and the full width of the sofa, with cushions just visible above the wood.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the absence of a platform on this side and the clean, straight lines of the sofa's profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all uniform in size and placed side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: No armrests present; left side features an integrated wooden platform at seat height, right side is open.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, made of exposed light wood matching the frame.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest with two large, loose back cushions; medium height, no tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray with a subtle, slightly pebbled texture; no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
